absolutely-delicious-green-bean-casserol.name: Absolutely Delicious Green Bean Casserole From Scratch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place green beans in a saucepan and fill with about 1/2 inch water; bring to a boil. Cover and steam until beans are tender but still bright green, about 5 minutes. Drain.
Combine drained beans in a bowl with mushrooms; toss to combine.

Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and parsley; cook and stir until onion is tender, 5 to 7 minutes. Whisk in flour until blended, then mix in lemon zest, salt, and pepper. Gradually whisk in milk, stirring constantly, so that no lumps form.
Add sour cream and stir until combined. Warm over medium heat until sauce begins to bubble. Dump in green beans and mushrooms, stirring to coat.
Remove from the heat and toss briefly with 1/2 of the Cheddar cheese and 1/2 of the French-fried onions. Spoon into a 1 ½-quart casserole dish; top with the remaining Cheddar and onions.
Bake in the preheated oven until Cheddar is melted, about 15 minutes.
Serve and enjoy.

aegean-sea-sea-bream-with-creamy-mushroo.name: Aegean Sea Sea Bream With Creamy Mushrooms
instructions: 1. Remove 1 pack Aegean chip from deep freezer.
2. Cook it according to the cooking proposal written on the package.
3. slice the fungus so that it will not be fine after washing under very few flowing water.
4. Heat the olive oil in the pan.
5. Add and paste the onion and yellowms you're eating.
6. Add mushroom and lemon juice and soak in medium fire for 5-6 minutes.
7. Add and mix the cream, salt and pepper.
8. After boiling a stone, add and mix fine chopped yeast.
9. Take the service plate.
10. Take the Aegean chip on it and serve.
11.  Afiyet olsun.
12. Add the recipe of creamy mushroom soup that you can prepare with cream and mushroom, which is often included in the food.

air-fryer-beyond-meat-brats-onions-and-p.name: Air Fryer Beyond Meat Brats, Onions, And Peppers

ingredients.item: Links vegetarian bratwurst sausage (such as beyond meat®)
Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine vegetarian sausage slices, onion, bell peppers, olive oil, salt, and pepper in a large bowl; stir to coat. Pour mixture into the basket of the air fryer.
Cook in the preheated air fryer for 10 minutes. Shake the basket and cook for 5 more minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of sausage should read 74°C (74 degrees C).

air-fried-sweet-and-sour-chicken-wings.name: Air-fried Sweet And Sour Chicken Wings
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 193°C (190 degrees C).
Place wings in a large bowl. Drizzle oil over the top, sprinkle with salt, and stir until evenly combined. Place 1/2 of the wings in the air fryer basket, skin side down.

Air fry wings for 10 minutes. Flip wings over using tongs and cook for 10 minutes more. Increase temperature to 204°C (200 degrees C). Flip wings over and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes more. Repeat with remaining wings.
Meanwhile, combine sugar, vinegar, water, soy sauce, cornstarch, and ketchup in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Whisk until sauce has thickened, 3 to 5 minutes. Turn heat off and let cool slightly.
Place wings in a large bowl. Pour sauce over the top, toss to coat, and serve immediately.

almond-and-grain-sorrels-teleculinaria.name: Almond And Grain Sorrels
instructions: Make the dough: Lay the flour in a bowl, add the margarine and lard and mix very well until it becomes a kind of moist sand. In a separate bowl, beat the egg with the water, add it to the preparation and knead, without working hard, until a homogeneous mass is left.

The filling: take a pot to the fire with the water, the Yellow Sugar RAR, the lemon peel and the cinnamon stick, stir and let it boil for about 10 minutes. Drain and pass the grain cooked through the pass, add to the pot, also add the granulated almond and stir until it begins to boil. In a bowl, beat the yolks, add some of the mix of the pot always stirring, add to the pot and let cook, stirring continuously until it begins to thicken. Take it out of the fire and let it cool.

Extend the dough on a flour-sprinkled countertop, have some of the stuffing, brush around with some water, fold and cut in a rissol shape. Repeat the operation until the stuffing and the dough are finished and then the sours fry until they are golden on both sides. Let it drip on a sheet of kitchen paper, then go through powdered sugar and serve decorated to taste.

almond-milk.name: Almond Milk
instructions: Place almonds in a bowl and pour in enough water to cover; soak at least 12 hours. Drain water.

Blend almonds and 3 cups water in a blender on low speed for 10 seconds. Turn blender off for 5 seconds. Blend almonds and water on high speed for 60 seconds. Pour mixture through cheesecloth or a nut bag into a bowl. Discard the pulp or save for another use.
Clean the blender and return milk to blender; add agave nectar and salt. Blend milk until smooth.

alt-grain-porridge-with-sausages-and-gra.name: Alt-grain Porridge With Sausages And Grapes
instructions: Pulse spelt in a blender or food processor until coarsely chopped (all of the grains should be broken open but not ground to a powder). Combine spelt and 4 cups water in a large saucepan over medium-high; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, whisking occasionally, until spelt is tender and mixture is thick, 25–35 minutes. Whisk in Parmesan and butter. Add water by tablespoonfuls if needed to loosen.

While porridge is simmering, heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook sausages, turning occasionally, until browned all over and partially cooked but still pink in the center, 6–8 minutes. Add grapes to skillet and cook, tossing and crushing some with a wooden spoon, until browned and slightly saucy, and sausages are cooked through, about 5 minutes. Transfer sausages to a plate.

Add wine and vinegar to skillet and cook until juices are thickened and syrupy, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and add thyme and butter, swirling pan to incorporate butter into sauce; season with salt and pepper.
Divide grain porridge among bowls. Divide sausages, grapes, and sauce over top.

alton-brown-turkey-brine.name: Alton Brown Turkey Brine
instructions: Two to three days before roasting, thaw the turkey in the refrigerator or in a cooler kept at 38° F, tops.

To make the turkey brine: Combine the broth, salt, sugar, peppercorns, allspice, and finger in a large stockpot and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Stir until the salt and sugar dissolve. Remove from the heat. Cool to room temperature, then refrigerate the brine.

The eve before roasting, combine the brine and the iced water in a cooler. Place the thawed turkey (guts, neck, and whatnot removed) breast side down in the brine. Seal up the cooler and use it as an ottoman. Target bring time: 12 hours; flip the bird once about halfway through.
On roasting day: Heat the oven to 260°C. Remove the bird from the brine and rinse inside and out. Discard brine.
Place the bird on a roasting rack and place inside a roasting pan. Pat the bird dry (inside and out) with paper towels.
Combine the apple, onion, cinnamon, and water in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high for 5 minutes. Add to the turkey’s cavity, along with the rosemary and sage. Truss, if you like.
Lightly coat the bird with canola oil. Roast the bird on the lowest rack of the oven for 30 minutes.
Insert a probe thermometer into the thickest part of the breast and reduce the oven temperature to 177°C.
Roast until the thermometer registers 68°C, about 2½ hours.

amazingly-tomato-sauce.name: Amazingly Tomato Sauce
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large, heavy pot over medium heat. Cook and stir onion and garlic in hot oil until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.

Stir crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, and water into onion mixture until smooth; add sugar, parsley, basil, salt, Italian seasoning, fennel, and pepper. Stir well and bring to a simmer; reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened, 1 to 1 1/2 hours.

and-baked-buffalo-chicken-dip.name: And Baked Buffalo Chicken Dip
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a baking dish.

Beat cream cheese, hot sauce, 1/2 cup pepper Jack cheese, and blue cheese dressing together in a large bowl; fold in chicken until completely coated. Pour mixture into the prepared baking dish and top with crumbled blue cheese and 1/3 cup pepper Jack cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and dip is bubbling up the sides, 15 to 20 minutes.

and-healthy-oatmeal-cookies-pequerecetas.name: And Healthy Oatmeal Cookies
and-healthy-oatmeal-cookies-pequerecetas.original_name: Galletas de avena fáciles y saludables

ingredients.item: 230 g oatmeal flakes (2 cups and ½ cm)
120 g brown sugar (½ cup well filled)
½ teaspoons of chemical yeast (royal type)
1 cucharadita de esencia de vainilla o avellana

instructions: We purify the oven at 180 ° C with heat up and down.
In a bowl we mix 230 g of oatmeal (2 ½ cups) with 100 g of flour (3 cm), ½ teaspoon of chemical yeast and a pint of salt.
In another bowl we beat 2 M eggs with 120 g of brown sugar (½ cup filled), 150 ml of extra virgin olive oil (∞ cup) and 1 teaspoon of vanilla or hazelnut essence.
Let's put the liquid mixture onto the dry ingredients and remove well and get a consistent mass.
We mixed everything up, I just used to mix a spatula, no mixer or mixer required.
Once they're all mixed up, we form balls that we put up with our hands.
We put them on an oven plate and put them with each other.
We bake at 180 ° C, it should be preheated, about 12 minutes or till you see that the edges are golden.
We put them out and leave them on a grid. Once they get cold they'll end up tougher.

apple-cider-and-maple-cream-tart-with-ma.name: Apple Cider And Maple Cream Tart With Maple-cranberry Compote

ingredients.item: Fresh apple cider or cold-pressed apple juice

instructions: Blend flour, powdered sugar, and coarse salt in processor 5 seconds. Add butter and blend until dough comes together in moist clumps. Gather dough into ball. Press dough evenly onto bottom and up sides of 9-inch-diameter tart pan with removable bottom. Cover and chill crust at least 1 hour and up to 2 days.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Bake chilled crust uncovered 10 minutes. Using back of fork, press bottom of crust to flatten (do not pierce). Continue to bake until crust is deep golden brown, pressing again if bottom of crust puffs, 16 to 18 minutes longer. Cool crust completely.

Bring apple cider or apple juice to rolling boil in large pot over high heat. Boil until bubbling thickly and reduced to generous 3/4 cup, stirring occasionally, 40 to 45 minutes. Transfer to small bowl and cool. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Grind maple sugar to powder in spice mill, blender, or mini processor. Transfer powdered maple sugar to 4-cup glass measuring cup; add cream, eggs, 1/4 teaspoon coarse salt, nutmeg, extract, and 3/4 cup cooled cider reduction and whisk to blend well.

Place tart pan with crust on baking sheet; set on rack in oven. Pour in filling. Bake tart until filling is puffed and cracked around edges and gently set in center, about 33 minutes. Transfer tart to rack and cool to room temperature, 1 to 2 hours.
Push up pan bottom, releasing tart. Cut tart into wedges and serve with compote and whipped cream, if desired.

apple-pandowdy.name: Apple Pandowdy

ingredients.item: Pink lady and/or granny smith apples

ingredients.prep: thawed by covering pastry sheet with plastic and leaving at room temperature 30 minutes

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Cook 6 Tbsp. butter in a small saucepan over medium heat, swirling often, until bubbling and golden, about 5 minutes; set aside.

Prepare your apples: Using a vegetable peeler, remove peel from apples. Stand them upright and slice down along core, working all the way around to remove big lobes of flesh. Cut lobes lengthwise into 1" pieces (irregular shapes are fine). Discard peel and cores. Transfer apples to a large bowl.
Add ⅔ cup dark brown sugar, 3 Tbsp. flour, 1 Tbsp. vanilla, 2 tsp. cinnamon, and ½ tsp. salt to bowl with apples.

Using a microplane or fine rasp grater, grate zest of ½ lemon over apples. Cut lemon in half and squeeze juice from zested half over apples, catching any seeds. Using peeler, remove peel from ginger, then grate over apples.
Toss apple mixture until combined, then transfer to a shallow 3-qt. baking dish. Drizzle all but 2 Tbsp. brown butter over apples.
Dust cutting board with a light coating of flour and unfold puff pastry on floured surface. Dust top with flour. Cut puff pastry into irregular 1" pieces (any shape is fine).
Arrange pieces of puff pastry over apples, overlapping but spreading to cover almost completely. Brush pastry with remaining brown butter. Sprinkle with granulated sugar.

Bake pandowdy until pastry is puffed and golden around edges, 25–30 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 350° and continue to bake until juices are thick and bubbling and pastry is brown all over, 30–35 minutes longer.
Using a spoon, press pastry down into warm juices (but don’t submerge); let cool slightly.
Serve pandowdy warm with ice cream.
Do Ahead: Pandowdy can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool. Cover loosely with foil and store at room temperature. Reheat uncovered in a 200° oven 20 minutes before serving.

apple-pie-cookies.name: Apple Pie Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

To make the dough: Beat butter, cream cheese, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl until smooth. Add flour, 5 teaspoons sugar, baking powder, and 1 teaspoon cinnamon; mix until dough comes together.
Roll dough into a 1/4-inch thick round on a floured work surface. Cut out 48 circles with a cookie cutter.
Top 24 dough circles with a teaspoon of apple pie filling. Cover with remaining 24 dough circles. Crimp edges with a fork to seal. Arrange cookies on lined baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until cookies are golden brown, 23 to 29 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes.
To make the topping: Mix 2 tablespoons sugar and 1 teaspoon cinnamon together in a shallow bowl. Roll warm cookies in sugar and cinnamon mixture until coated. Transfer to a wire rack to cool briefly.

apples-and-oranges-amaro-spiked-hot-cide.name: Apples And Oranges (amaro-spiked Hot Cider)

ingredients.item: To 3 tsp. fresh lemon juice (to taste
ingredients.prep: depending on the sweetness of your cider)

instructions: Add 3 oz. Grand Marnier, 1 oz. Amaro Averna, and a small pat of salted butter to a 16-ounce travel mug or large heatproof measuring cup. Add 1 cup hot apple cider and stir until butter melts.

Add 1½ tsp. fresh lemon juice and taste for sweetness, adding additional if needed. If serving in travel mug, garnish with ground pink peppercorns and seal. If serving in mugs, divide drink between two warmed mugs and garnish each with a pink peppercorn-dusted lemon wheel.

apricot-crumble-parfait.name: Apricot Crumble Parfait
instructions: Cook apricots, sugar, and 1 cup water in a small heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally, until apricots are plump, soft, and just beginning to break down, about 30 minutes. Transfer compote to a small bowl and let cool completely. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and refrigerate.

Preheat oven to 350°. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl. Rub mixture with your fingertips until butter is completely incorporated and mixture resembles wet sand. Spread out on a rimmed baking sheet.
Bake, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, 15–17 minutes. Let cool completely. DO AHEAD:Can be made 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Scoop 2 Tbsp. ice cream into each small jar or sturdy glass. Spoon 1 Tbsp. apricot compote over ice cream and top with 1 Tbsp. crumble. Repeat with remaining ingredients for 6 layers total. Freeze for 30 minutes to set.

arepa-reina-pepiada-the-most-popular-ven.name: Arepa Reina Pepiada (the Most Popular Venezuelan Arepa Recipe)
arepa-reina-pepiada-the-most-popular-ven.original_name: Arepa Reina Pepiada (la receta de arepa venezolana más popular)
instructions: In a big bowl, mix corn and salt.
Add tibia and mix with your hands to form a smooth and homogenous mass. If you wish, you can add a tablespoon of oil to give an extra softness. Let the dough stand for 5 minutes.
It forms mass balls of the size of a small orange and gently placates them to form discs about 1 cm thick.
Warm an iron or frying pan with medium-high heat. It cooks each arepa about 5 minutes on each side, until they are golden and form a slightly crispy bark.

Cooking chicken breast with salt water till tender. Let cool and crumbling. In a frying pan, heats up a tablespoon of oil and pits onion and garlic till they are clear. Add the pitted chicken and leap for a few minutes. Hail to taste.
In a bowl, mix chicken with mayonnaise and avocado cut into cubes. Add a lemon juice and, if you wish, minced cilantro for a fresh touch.
Abre una arepa por la mitad, como si fuese un bolsillo. Rellena generosamente con la mezcla de pollo y aguacate.

aromatic-puff-pastry-tart-with-pumpkin-a.name: Aromatic Puff Pastry Tart With Pumpkin And Carrot
aromatic-puff-pastry-tart-with-pumpkin-a.original_name: Αρωματική τάρτα σφολιάτας με κολοκύθι και καρότο

ingredients.item: 1 egg, split into yolk and white
1 egg, split into yolk and white

instructions: Wash and dry the vegetarians.
Using the peeler (piler) or mandolin, cut into much of the above transparent-long slides the pumpkin and carrot.
Add the thin slices of vegetarians to a bowl, add the lemon zest and juice, olive oil, garlic, some salt and pepper and mix to oil well.
Let them marinate while preparing the basis of the tart.
In a bowl, mix the cream cheese (or anthotyr), with feta cheese, yoghurt, yolk, mint and some pepper until we have a mixture of creamy texture.
Spread the puff pastry sheet on a shadow baking pan line with non-stick paper. With a knife, cut a box of 21⁄2 cm to create a brush around the Leaf.
Spread with a spoon on the basis of the puff pastry the cheese mixture into a thinking layer leaving the box we taken empty.
We rub the capitalary perioder with the egg white.
Add the vegetarians over a layer covering the cheese mixture complete.
Bake the tart in a well preheated oven, at 200°C, in the air, in the medium grill, for 10 minutes.
Lower with the temperature at 180°C, sprinkle the surface of the tart with a cephalogravier and continue baking for 25 more minutes until the sfoliata is around and ever browned.
Dilute the pesto with a few drops of olive oil and a few drops of lemon juice to make it more liquid and sprayle the tart.
Let it stand for 5 minutes and drop its temperature and then cut and serve.

arugula-pesto.name: Arugula Pesto
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add arugula and cook until bright green, about 30 seconds. Remove arugula to a bowl full of ice water for several minutes until cold. Drain and wring out arugula.
Pulse arugula, olive oil, almonds, and garlic together in a blender, scraping down the sides, until mixture just becomes a coarse puree. Pour puree into a bowl and season with salt.

asparagus-and-swiss-cheese-quiche.name: Asparagus And Swiss Cheese Quiche

ingredients.item: Pastry for a 10-inch deep-dish pie crust

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir asparagus until slightly tender, 5 to 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Press pie pastry into a 10-inch deep-dish pie pan.
Combine asparagus, eggs, milk, half-and-half, French-fried onions, Swiss cheese, Cheddar cheese, and green onion in a bowl. Pour into prepared pie pastry.
Bake in the preheated oven until center of quiche is set and a knife inserted in the middle comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Allow to stand for 10 minutes before serving.

authentic-new-orleans-red-beans-and-rice.name: Authentic New Orleans Red Beans And Rice
instructions: Melt shortening in a skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onion, bell pepper, and garlic in hot shortening until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.

Combine water, red beans, and ham hock in a large pot; bring to a boil. Stir onion mixture into the pot; add smoked sausage and celery. Return to a boil. Stir bay leaves, Creole seasoning, thyme, and sage into boiling water. Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and simmer until beans are tender, about 5 hours.
Remove and discard ham hock and bay leaves; stir in hot pepper sauce and serve over white rice.

avocado-and-grapefruit-salad.name: Avocado And Grapefruit Salad

ingredients.item: Verjus* or 3 1/2 teaspoons white grape juice and 2 1/2 teaspoons apple cider vinegar

ingredients.prep: halved, pitted, peeled, thinly sliced, rinsed under cold water
all peel and white pith cut away, segments cut from between membranes

instructions: Whisk first 3 ingredients in small bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in both oils. Season dressing to taste with sea salt and pepper.
Arrange lettuce on platter. Top with avocado and grapefruit, then dressing.

avocado-chickpea-salad-with-chili-lime-d.name: Avocado Chickpea Salad With Chili Lime Dressing
instructions: For the dressing, combine dressing ingredients in a small bowl. Whisk together until mixed thoroughly.
In a large bowl, combine chickpeas, cucumber, tomatoes, onion, avocado, carrots, and dressing. Toss together until evenly combined.
Serve and garnish.
Enjoy!
